content.full_text:
11/03/90

Fair Political Practice Commission  
428 J. Street  
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Re: Disclosure

As of late Friday afternoon the second of November a group of individuals had provided funds for a supporters ad separate from the campaign committee of Anna Sparks for Supervisor (committee number 900073). The ad was a result of these individuals objection to ads by the opponents, Krebs for Supervisor Committee (see enclosed ads).

The individual checks were received by the Times-Standard newspaper for payment of this ad and would exceeded $1,000.00 total collected.

As of this time I have questions on what procedure would be required to make a proper reporting of this ad? Supporters provided individual checks made directly to the newspaper (see attached copies of checks received)

As there is no bank account, no formal committee, no treasure and the ad (see enclosed) is the only function of the group, I have given my name and address as contact person for questions.

I have informed the Sparks Committee that the ad was to be run and they suggested that their committee name and identification number be placed on the ad so that there would be no question that the contributions would be accounted for. A copy of this letter and attachments have been provided to the Sparks Committee. Anna Sparks for Supervisor Committee however had no control over the development, content nor decision to publish this ad. After receipt of notice of this ad the Sparks committee has suggested that they be listed as a control committee who will account for all money spent as campaign contributions received.

I assume that the filing of a form 410 and a termination form 415 as well as providing a copy of the all checks received by the Times-Standard and listing all contributions made will cover all reporting requirements?

Sincerely,

Mark Rynearson

cc. Humboldt County Elections Division  
Sparks for Supervisor Committee

Total Committe Income and Expenditure:

Income:
    Checks paid to Times Standard      - $ 1,340.00
    Credit Louisiana Pacific Corp.     -      88.34
    Checks & cash - paid Creative Type -   130.00
                                            _________
                                            $ 1,558.34
                                            ===========

Expense:
    Times-Standard - ad                - $ 1,428.84
    Creative Type - ad layout           -   130.00
                                            _________
                                            $ 1,558.34
                                            ===========

Net Balance                                 .00
                                            ===========

TELEGRAM

Fair Political Practice Commission
428 J. Street
Sacramento, Ca. 95814

Re: Statement of Organization

As per requirement this is a notification that the following committee has been established and has collected more that $1,000.00 in contributions and will file a form 410 within 10 days:

Name Committee: Friends of Sparks
Purpose: Publish supporter ad
Amount Collected: $1,559.00
Address: 1715 Central Avenue
McKinleyville, Ca. 95521
Contact Person: Mark Rynearson
Phone: 707-839-4105
Candidate Supported: Anna Sparks For Supervisor
Committee #900073
Humboldt County

A form 410 with attachments will be provided to the election division of Humboldt County on 11/5/90 and a copy forwarded by mail to the Fair Political Practices Commission on the same date.

Signed
Mark Rynearson
